errors.noData: No data received. Are you online?

messages.notValidated: The transaction is not yet validated.
messages.notValidatedAfterLedger: It won't be validated if Ledger already passed the Ledger #{{ledger}}.
messages.specifiedFee: It was specified to spend {{fee}} as transaction fee.

memosThirdParty.prefix: Memos were added by the third party

affectedAccounts.suffix: accounts that were affected by this transaction.
affectedAccounts.summary_one: There is <bold>{{count}}</bold> account affected by this transaction.
affectedAccounts.summary_few: There are <bold>{{count}}</bold> accounts affected by this transaction.
affectedAccounts.summary_many: There are <bold>{{count}}</bold> accounts affected by this transaction.
affectedAccounts.summary_other: There are <bold>{{count}}</bold> accounts affected by this transaction.

exchanges.suffix: exchanges that occurred within this transaction.
exchanges.summary_one: There is <bold>{{count}}</bold> exchange that occurred within this transaction.
exchanges.summary_few: There are <bold>{{count}}</bold> exchanges that occurred within this transaction.
exchanges.summary_many: There are <bold>{{count}}</bold> exchanges that occurred within this transaction.
exchanges.summary_other: There are <bold>{{count}}</bold> exchanges that occurred within this transaction.

labels.It was instructed to spend up to {{amoun: It was instructed to spend up to {{amount}}.
labels.It was instructed to deliver at least {{: It was instructed to deliver at least {{amount}}.
labels.It was instructed for this payment to go: It was instructed for this payment to go through even if the whole amount cannot be delivered because of a lack of liquidity or funds in the source account.
labels.It was instructed to disregard any direc: It was instructed to disregard any direct paths from the source account to the destination account.
labels.It was instructed to only take paths whe: It was instructed to only take paths where all conversions have a rate equal to or better than 1 {{sourceCurrency}} = {{amount}}.
labels.Subject: Subject
labels.This Escrow was finished by the third pa: This escrow was finished by a third party (not by source or destination). Anyone can finish a time-based escrow after the time has passed.
labels.This Offer does not consume Offers that: This offer does not consume offers that exactly match it, and instead becomes an offer object in the ledger. It still consumes offers that cross it.
labels.This offer is an Immediate or Cancel ord: This offer is an immediate-or-cancel order. It executes only against existing matching offers at submission time and does not create a standing offer.
labels.This offer is a Fill or Kill order, mean: This offer is a fill-or-kill order. It executes only if it can be fully filled immediately and does not create a standing offer.
labels.The owner must be able to spend the enti: The owner must be able to spend the entire {{amount}}.

tooltips.Allow Trustline tokens issued by this ac: Allow Trustline tokens issued by this account to be held in escrow.
tooltips.Another account that can mint NFTs for t: Another account that can mint NFTs for that account.
tooltips.Enable Deposit Authorization on this acc: Enable Deposit Authorization on this account.
tooltips.Enable rippling on this account's trustl: Enable rippling on this account's trustlines by default.
tooltips.Freeze all assets issued by this account: Freeze all assets issued by this account.
Number of times the cron should execute.
tooltips.Often used to add md5 hash of an email a: Often used to add MD5 hash of an email address for displaying a Gravatar image.
tooltips.Permanently give up the ability to freez: Permanently give up the ability to freeze individual trustlines or disable Global Freeze. This flag can never be disabled after being enabled.
tooltips.Public key for sending encrypted message: Public key for sending encrypted messages to this account.
tooltips.Require a destination tag to send transa: Require a destination tag to send transactions to this account.
tooltips.Require authorization for users to hold: Require authorization for users to hold balances issued by this address.
tooltips.Set of bit-flags for this transaction (U: Set of bit-flags for this transaction (UInt32)
tooltips.The Hook account initiating the cron. Th: The Hook account initiating the cron. This is the account that will be invoked when the cron executes.
tooltips.The amount and type of currency being bo: The amount and type of currency being bought.
tooltips.The amount and type of currency being so: The amount and type of currency being sold.
tooltips.The fee to charge when users transfer th: The fee to charge when users transfer this account's tokens.
tooltips.The last ledger sequence number that the: The last ledger sequence number that the transaction can be included in. Specifying this field places a strict upper limit on how long the transaction can wait to be validated or rejected.
tooltips.The network ID of the chain this transac: The network ID of the chain this transaction is intended for.
tooltips.The sequence number of the account sendi: The sequence number of the account sending the transaction.
tooltips.The sequence number of the ticket to use: The sequence number of the ticket to use in place of a Sequence number.
The use of the master key pair.
tooltips.The value is stored as part of the accou: The value is stored as part of the account but has no inherent meaning or requirements.
tooltips.This field is valid in AccountSet transa: This field is valid in AccountSet transactions but does nothing.
tooltips.Tick size to use for offers involving a: Tick size to use for offers involving a currency issued by this address.
tooltips.Time after which the Offer is no longer: Time after which the offer is no longer active.
tooltips.Time interval in seconds between each ex: Time interval in seconds between each execution.
tooltips.Time when the first execution should occ: Time when the first execution should occur.
tooltips.Track the ID of this account's most rece: Track the ID of this account's most recent transaction.
tooltips.Transaction Signature Hook Collection, a: Transaction Signature Hook Collection, allowing automated procedures to automatically pay required network fees for generated transactions.
tooltips.Unique identifier of a flag to disable f: Unique identifier of a flag to disable for this account.
tooltips.allow account to claw back tokens it has: Allow account to claw back tokens it has issued.
tooltips.allow another account to mint NFTs on th: Allow another account to mint NFTs on this account's behalf.
